scripts.dev: concurrently -n host,identity,mentoring,content,engagement -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w host-shell" "npm run dev -w @guided-mentor/identity" "npm run dev -w @guided-mentor/mentoring" "npm run dev -w @guided-mentor/content" "npm run dev -w @guided-mentor/engagement"
scripts.build: npm run build -w host-shell && npm run build -w @guided-mentor/identity && npm run build -w @guided-mentor/mentoring && npm run build -w @guided-mentor/content && npm run build -w @guided-mentor/engagement
scripts.preview: concurrently -n host,identity,mentoring,content,engagement -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan "npm run preview -w host-shell" "npm run preview -w @guided-mentor/identity" "npm run preview -w @guided-mentor/mentoring" "npm run preview -w @guided-mentor/content" "npm run preview -w @guided-mentor/engagement"
